overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in a brown coat walking through a futuristic neon-lit urban environment. The character moves from a covered pedestrian market with food stalls into an open city street with towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements, eventually approaching a parked futuristic vehicle.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian market entrance with vendor stalls

events.description: camera tilts down from skyscrapers and enters covered walkway structure
moving from bright natural sunlight into shaded covered area with artificial neon lighting

agents.ego_description: character in brown coat walking steadily through the entrance of a covered market walkway

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown coat walking ahead in same direction

entered.detail: towering futuristic building with large digital advertisements and holographic displays
red and yellow metal truss roof structure covering pedestrian walkway
small vendor stalls with green awnings and illuminated digital menus

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a dramatic upward view of futuristic skyscrapers adorned with holographic advertisements before tilting down to follow a character entering a covered pedestrian walkway. The lighting shifts from bright natural sun to shaded artificial neon as the character walks past concrete pillars and food stalls.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior covered market walkway with vendor stalls and escalator

events.description: character briefly turns right to navigate around oncoming pedestrian
passing close to concrete barrier temporarily obscuring right side of view

agents.ego_description: navigating through covered walkway passing various NPCs and food vendors

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind food stall counter
pedestrian in white shirt walking toward camera

entered.detail: bright yellow escalator with metal sides leading to upper level
red and white striped concrete dividers lining the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the interior of the covered market, passing red and white concrete barriers and food stalls. A prominent yellow escalator structure appears on the right while the character navigates through moderate pedestrian traffic moving in opposing directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: exit of covered market approaching open city intersection

events.description: exiting covered walkway into open urban street with tall buildings
crossing marked pedestrian crosswalk with yellow and red painted lines

agents.ego_description: exiting the covered market and crossing the open street toward a large building with billboards

notable_agents.action: black sedan parked along the curb

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying Cirrus Cola advertisement on building facade
row of purple automated vending machines against dark building wall

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into bright sunlight, revealing a large Cirrus Cola billboard ahead. The scene opens into a wide urban intersection with the character crossing marked pedestrian lines while approaching purple vending machines and parked vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street corner with vending machines and parked vehicle

events.description: character slows approach toward parked black sedan
interaction prompt appears on vehicle door indicating option to enter car

agents.ego_description: approaching black futuristic sedan with intent to enter vehicle

notable_agents.action: black futuristic sedan with Get In interaction prompt visible on door

entered.detail: sleek black sedan with tinted windows and illuminated door interface
curved glass skyscraper with multiple holographic advertisements

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character approaching a parked black futuristic sedan next to purple vending machines. The camera focuses on the vehicle as an interaction prompt appears, indicating the character is about to enter the car. The surrounding area features tall glass buildings with holographic ads in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a towering urban skyline into a shaded pedestrian market and finally back out into a bright, open city intersection. It begins with a dramatic upward view of skyscrapers and holographic advertisements before tilting down to follow a character entering a covered walkway, where the lighting shifts from natural sunlight to shaded artificial neon. As the character navigates past concrete pillars and food stalls, the camera moves through the interior of the market, passing red and white barriers and a prominent yellow escalator amidst a flow of pedestrian traffic. The scene then opens as the character emerges from the shade into brilliant sunlight, crossing a wide intersection beneath a large Cirrus Cola billboard. Finally, the camera approaches a parked black futuristic sedan and purple vending machines, focusing on the vehicle against a backdrop of glass buildings and holographic ads.
